summary: Iteration 26: Exit History Feature - All tests passed. Backend: 11/11 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Exit History section renders correctly on portfolios with exits (value_stocks, bespoke_forward_looking, quick_entry) and correctly hidden on portfolios without exits (long_term, swing, alpha_generator).
passed_tests: GET /api/portfolios/exit-history/value_stocks returns exits with reconstructed data (buy_price, quantity, estimated=true)
GET /api/portfolios/exit-history/bespoke_forward_looking returns exits with KRN stock
GET /api/portfolios/exit-history/quick_entry returns exits with KRN stock
GET /api/portfolios/exit-history/long_term returns empty exits array with 'No exits yet' explanation
Exit history math consistency: cost_basis = buy_price * quantity, proceeds = exit_price * quantity, realized_pnl = proceeds - cost_basis
Regression: /api/portfolios/overview returns honest P&L (total_pnl = total_value - total_capital)
Regression: /api/portfolios/xirr/value_stocks returns capital field and uses capital basis
Frontend: Value Stocks detail page shows 'Capital Trail — Where did the ₹50L go?' section with data-testid='exit-history-section'
Frontend: Exit History shows 4 summary metric cards (Original Capital ₹50L, Capital Removed -₹8.04L, Cost Basis Out ₹6.70L, Realized Gain/Loss +₹1.34L)
Frontend: Detailed table shows GMDCLTD exit with Buy ₹604.35, Exit ₹725.40, Qty 1,108, P&L +₹134.1K (+20.03%), STOP_ENFORCED
Frontend: ~est amber badge appears next to stock symbol for reconstructed data
Frontend: Bespoke Forward Looking shows Exit History with KRN exit (₹964.20 → ₹1166.10, +20.94%)
Frontend: Long Term Compounder does NOT show Exit History section (correct - no exits)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing 6 AI portfolios with historical STOP_ENFORCED logs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 26 verified the new Exit History feature. The user requested transparency on per-portfolio losses: 'for each portfolio make a section as where the loss is made, which stock was bought and where it was exited and show the loss, because each portfolio started with 50 lakhs'. Backend endpoint GET /api/portfolios/exit-history/{strategy_type} returns: capital, current_value, capital_drop, total_capital_removed, total_realized_pnl, exits array with {symbol, buy_date, exit_date, buy_price, exit_price, quantity, cost_basis, proceeds, realized_pnl, realized_pnl_pct, trigger, estimated} fields. For old STOP_ENFORCED logs (missing entry_price/qty), the endpoint reconstructs entry price from yfinance historical data at portfolio.created_at date. The 'estimated' flag is set to true for reconstructed data. Frontend ExitHistorySection component (line ~622 in PortfolioDetail.js) renders between XirrSection and Summary Stats. It shows 4 summary metric cards and a detailed table with all exit data. The ~est amber badge appears next to stock symbols for reconstructed data. For portfolios without exits (long_term, swing, alpha_generator), the section returns null and does not render. Regression tests confirm /api/portfolios/overview and /api/portfolios/xirr/* still return honest P&L data.
